class.name: ASEventTag
class.brief_description: Event dispatcher tag for transient system notifications (Event.Damage, Event.Ability.Activated).
class.description:
ASEventTag represents event identifiers used with the dispatch system. These are transient signals that flow through the system informing about specific occurrences.
Events are instant messengers that carry context including instigator, magnitude, and custom payload. They prevent spaghetti code by providing a clean event-driven architecture for combat, ability triggers, and system notifications.
From BUSINESS_RULES.md: "Represent specific informative occurrences." Events are dispatched via ASComponent.dispatch_event() and can be queried through the Events Historical buffer for temporal reactivity.
ASEventTag provides convenience methods for dispatching events and checking if they occurred recently.

method.name: create
method.description: Creates a new ASEventTag with the specified name.

method.name: dispatch
method.description: Dispatches this event through the ASComponent system. Automatically finds the ASComponent on the instigator node.

method.name: occurred_recently
method.description: Checks if this event occurred on the target within the specified time window. Queries the Events Historical buffer for temporal reactivity.

method.name: DAMAGE_DEALT
method.description: Returns a predefined DAMAGE_DEALT combat event tag.

method.name: DAMAGE_TAKEN
method.description: Returns a predefined DAMAGE_TAKEN combat event tag.

method.name: DAMAGE_BLOCKED
method.description: Returns a predefined DAMAGE_BLOCKED combat event tag.

method.name: HEAL_RECEIVED
method.description: Returns a predefined HEAL_RECEIVED combat event tag.

method.name: ABILITY_ACTIVATED
method.description: Returns a predefined ABILITY_ACTIVATED event tag.

method.name: ABILITY_FAILED
method.description: Returns a predefined ABILITY_FAILED event tag.

method.name: ABILITY_COOLDOWN_END
method.description: Returns a predefined ABILITY_COOLDOWN_END event tag.

method.name: ABILITY_INTERRUPTED
method.description: Returns a predefined ABILITY_INTERRUPTED event tag.

method.name: STUN_BEGIN
method.description: Returns a predefined STUN_BEGIN state event tag.

method.name: STUN_END
method.description: Returns a predefined STUN_END state event tag.

method.name: DEATH
method.description: Returns a predefined DEATH event tag.

method.name: RESPAWN
method.description: Returns a predefined RESPAWN event tag.

method.name: WEAPON_HIT
method.description: Returns a predefined WEAPON_HIT combat event tag.

method.name: WEAPON_MISS
method.description: Returns a predefined WEAPON_MISS combat event tag.

method.name: WEAPON_CRITICAL
method.description: Returns a predefined WEAPON_CRITICAL combat event tag.

constants.constant: Tag type for event dispatcher tags.
